name: maestri-autopilot
description: Autonomous long-horizon orchestration workflow for Maestri teams in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run supervised Maestri agent teams with hook-backed mission control.
interface.longDescription: Maestri Autopilot packages an orchestration skill, lifecycle hooks, and local helper scripts for long-horizon Codex sessions that coordinate Maestri agents, shared notes, browser portals, worktrees, commits, and validation loops.
defaultPrompt: Use Maestri Autopilot for this project.
